link_types.name: derived_from
link_types.description: Refinement / breakdown lineage. The source artifact was produced by refining one or more parent-layer artifacts.
link_types.notes: Per TARGET §7, derived_from points at the parent spec at the layer above. A TestSpec at a given layer derives from that layer's own spec (Requirements at branches, DD at leaves, PB/Requirements at root) — not from a layer below.

link_types.name: allocates
link_types.description: Parent architecture assigns responsibility to a child for one or more requirements at the parent's scope.
link_types.notes: Carried per child entry inside the architecture Decomposition section. Target ids are individual REQ ids (per-requirement), not the REQS artifact id.

link_types.name: verifies
link_types.description: A TestSpec (artifact level) or test case (per-case level) verifies a spec element — a requirement, architecture child or interface, or a Detailed Design element.
link_types.notes: Field-level granularity is the sole exception to the artifact-level default (TARGET §7) — test cases legitimately target specific preconditions, postconditions, or error paths. Anti-orphan rule: non-empty verifies is enforced inline by test-spec.schema.json at both artifact and per-case level (minItems 1).

link_types.name: governing_adrs
link_types.description: Source artifact is subject to one or more ADRs whose decisions constrain it.

link_types.name: supersedes
link_types.description: ADR lineage forward — the source ADR replaces a predecessor that is no longer in force.
link_types.notes: When set, the superseded ADR must carry a matching superseded_by pointing back (bi-directional consistency checked at validation time, not by this catalog).

link_types.name: superseded_by
link_types.description: ADR lineage backward — the source ADR has been replaced by a newer one.

link_types.name: scope_tags
link_types.description: Primary scopes the ADR applies to — where the decision is load-bearing.

link_types.name: affected_scopes
link_types.description: Downstream scopes bound by an ADR even when they are not its primary target.

link_types.name: realizes
link_types.description: A Build-side artifact (code file, test file, deployment config) realizes a spec-side artifact. Reserved for the future Build workflow; not emitted by any spec-side artifact today.
link_types.notes: Forward-compatibility hook per TARGET §7 and §8.4. Activated when the Build workflow is designed.

reverse_derived.name: derives
reverse_derived.description: Inverse of derived_from — parent artifact's children. Tool-computed from the forward graph; never stored in front-matter.

reverse_derived.name: verified_by
reverse_derived.description: Inverse of verifies — a requirement, architecture child, or DD element lists the TestSpec cases that verify it. Tool-computed from the forward graph.

reverse_derived.name: realized_by
reverse_derived.description: Inverse of realizes — a spec-side artifact lists the build-side artifacts that implement or exercise it. Tool-computed; empty today until the Build workflow lands.
